nodes.label: Fast Path (Existing Graph Query)
nodes.rationale: Skip Steps 1-5 entirely if graph.json already exists and the request is a natural-language question — avoids re-extraction cost and latency.

nodes.label: Part C: Merge AST + Semantic Extraction
nodes.norm_label: part c: merge ast + semantic extraction

nodes.label: Step 9: Save Manifest, Update Cost Tracker, Clean Up
nodes.norm_label: step 9: save manifest, update cost tracker, clean up

nodes.label: Honesty Rules
nodes.rationale: Never invent edges, always show token cost, never hide cohesion scores — maintains trust in the audit trail.

nodes.label: Node ID Format Rules
nodes.rationale: stem_{entity} format using only immediate parent dir ensures IDs match AST extractor output, preventing orphan ghost-duplicate nodes.

nodes.label: Confidence Score Rubric
nodes.rationale: Discrete values (0.95/0.85/0.75/0.65/0.55) rather than a continuous range prevent bimodal collapse to 0.5/0.85 that was observed in production.

nodes.label: Valid file_type Values
nodes.rationale: Exactly six valid file_type values (code, document, paper, image, rationale, concept) — any other value is rejected.

nodes.label: Code-Only Change Fast Path (Skip Semantic)
nodes.rationale: If all changed files are code, skip semantic subagents entirely — AST re-extraction handles code without LLM cost.

nodes.label: Domain Hint Prompt for Whisper
nodes.rationale: Composing a domain hint from god node labels improves Whisper transcription accuracy without an extra API call.
